title: Goat Mod
description: This is a mod that adds some items in the theme of goats
body:
Unleash the power of goats in your Minecraft world with the Goat mod! This mod introduces a variety of goat-themed features, including new mobs, items, and unique gameplay mechanics.

![Goat](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/798fdc54f7bd367b36793e2c0b276f34788729bf.webp)
